title: Fail to parse hexadecimal constants that start with a B

features.name: unbased hex constant starting with letter digit
features.description: Code should include a hexadecimal constant starting with a letter digit (a-f or b) without an explicit size specifier, where the letter could be confused with a binary base specifier

features.name: unbased unsized hex constant with letter first digit
features.description: Code should include an unbased unsized hex constant where the first hex digit is a letter (a-f or b), which causes ambiguity with binary literal syntax
